transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Hey, how's going?
Well, I will just share really quickly.
I'm back and I was traveling last few days.
So back to normal.
So we can spend more time.
Okay, so I put together the agenda for today.
And so hopefully I know I'm still driving a lot of this.
But what I would love for you to do is during the meeting, you can take notes as well here.
We have the meeting note taker, but still it's like an and track action items.
And then at the end, grab the recording link and put it here and then send the follow up.
And if you want to send the follow up to me first, that would be great.
Great.

And then we can start to kind of templatize this so that in the weekly meetings, once we're done with the first six weeks and we're in kind of like the daily or the weekly cadence, then the weekly meetings, some of the weekly meetings you might be leading in, instead of me.

But for now, we're still in kind of the big build mode and there's still like a lot of things like we're showing them, you know, and so this is kind of like us figuring out the templates so that we can replicate with other clients, you know.
then I pulled together three articles and so later on like I'll record a loom of kind of like the process a little bit.
I'm still building out the process, but the idea is to get feedback from them.
And so if you can follow up, especially with Kerry afterwards to, you know, tomorrow and just.
let's just start to group all the ones that we're considering into, like, essentially clusters, right?
So because there's a lot of, um, there's a lot of like overlap, I think, between, um, between them, right?
things are related.
So if we can start to cluster only the ones that we're considering, right?
Um, that, that would be super helpful.
Um, and, and then what I did was I actually created a flow and that I'll show you later, but I tagged every single keyword by product category.
Okay.
Yeah.
And so, um, the good thing with this is that, like, you can essentially, like filter by, um, like keywords related to, let's say payroll.
Yeah.
then start to tag those, like focus more on those, essentially, you know?
Yeah.
Um, cool.
And,

And then, and so then the idea is once we have a cluster, right, like set, so let me give you example, here's a cluster here, what I did was actually let me add it to here, I added keyword type, and so the idea, and I'll explain a little bit later.

But the idea is the main one, usually the one that had the most search volume, that has the best intent, right, is the primary, and then all the other ones are secondary, yeah, and so like, let's say, right now you can sort by keyword volume, and so like, let's just take a few things here, but then, so let's say.

we want to do what is gross income for example right so we can this one as a high search volume you can copy this into the parent keyword and then it will automatically move it to here and then this would be the primary and then usually what you can do is just like copy this and and then find any other keywords here that is like for example gross income right yeah and and then like change the and then there's a few others there like might be a little bit different but
to that you might not, you know, that this is more like comparison.
So maybe this is different gross income.
But you kind of get the idea, right?
they go through the ones that are kind of related.
And then like, now you have a cluster, and then a cluster will essentially become an actual article, you know?

So now like, you have here, and then you can change all of these into in progress once they go into, you know, the there, and then let's say you want to make this, what is gross income, the primary, all the other ones can be secondary, for example.
And then in the assignment later on, we'll tag that.
so that's the main area we're in right now.
so the idea is to go very heavy towards like the
the things that in this sheet here, right?
make sure like we have a lot of these, because I think these are the ones that don't have, essentially the ones that don't have a URL, but we can chat with them today as well about it.
But I'll record some loses as well.
tomorrow I have a lot of availability, so let's plan to spend some more time going through things together.
Yeah, cool.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the process for creating content clusters and assigning keywords to articles.](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to group related keywords into clusters that will become articles](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Identify primary keyword (highest search volume/best intent) and secondary keywords for each cluster](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Tag keywords by product category to filter and prioritize topics](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Plan to spend more time going through the process together](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

## Topics

### Content Clustering Process

  - [Group related keywords into clusters that will become articles](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Identify primary keyword (highest search volume/best intent)](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Tag remaining related keywords as secondary for that cluster](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Can filter/sort keywords by category, search volume, etc. to prioritize](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Keyword Tagging

  - [Keywords tagged by product category (e.g. payroll)](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Allows filtering to focus on specific topic areas](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Prioritize keywords without existing URLs first](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Group considered keywords into topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Identify primary and secondary keywords for each cluster](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Marcel to provide additional process documentation](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Schedule more time to collaborate on this process](https://fathom.video/share/tysiTYFCNYsvoNFUK9wtANgXuQNruK98?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

action_items.description: Follow up with Kerry tomorrow to gather feedback on articles under consideration
Cluster keywords that are being considered into groups based on relatedness
Schedule more time with Marcel to review materials
